name: precision: offers of future work are not claims of completed work
note: From all four dogfood reports. 'Want me to X', 'I can add Y', 'If you'd like' — every offer pattern got flagged. These are proposals, not assertions.
claim: Want me to start with the stats command? If you'd like, I can add a small helper command (e.g. `orunmila serve`) that does the same thing automatically — say the word. I'll fix the bug once this last run finishes.
